scripts.clean:service: (if exist service\bin rmdir /s /q service\bin) && (if exist service\obj rmdir /s /q service\obj)
scripts.clean:ts: npm run clean:shared && npm run clean:backend && npm run clean:client && npm run clean:serverless-worker
scripts.clean:all: npm run clean:service && npm run clean:ts
scripts.dev:ts: npx concurrently -k -n "BE,SH,WK,CL" -c "blue,yellow,green,cyan" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:shared" "npm run dev:serverless-worker" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.dev:all: npx concurrently -k -n "SV,SYNC,BE,SH,WK,CL" -c "magenta,purple,blue,yellow,green,cyan" "npm run dev:service" "npm run sync:types" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:shared" "npm run dev:serverless-worker" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.build:ts: npm run build:shared && npm run build:backend && npm run build:client
scripts.build:all: npm run build:service && npm run sync:types:once && npm run build:ts
